description: SDLC Pipeline DAG - 13 Stages (6 Core + 7 Extended)

product-discovery.name: Product Discovery
product-discovery.description: Transform vague ideas into evaluable feature descriptions via PRFAQ + demand validation

gate.notification: Product discovery complete. Review problem statement, demand evidence, and scope before strategic review.

auto_skip.condition: feature_description has: specific persona + clear problem + measurable criteria + scope boundary
auto_skip.description: Auto-skip when feature description is already well-defined (3+ of 4 criteria present)

review_guide.why: 产品方向决定后续所有投入，AI 能分析数据但无法替你决定「值不值得做」

star.situation: AI 已完成竞品分析、需求验证、用户画像，输出了产品发现报告
star.task: 判断：这个问题是否真实存在？目标用户是否愿意付费/使用？
star.result: GO = 进入战略评审 | NO-GO = 终止 pipeline 节省后续成本

checklist.question: 报告中的痛点是否与你的一线认知一致？有无被 AI 放大的伪需求？
checklist.how: 对比你的客户反馈/销售记录

checklist.question: 需求证据是强信号(付费意愿/竞品增长)还是弱信号(论坛吐槽)?
checklist.how: 检查 demand_evidence 字段的数据来源

checklist.question: MVP 范围是否足够小？能否 2 周内交付？
checklist.how: 检查 scope 字段，砍掉非核心功能

checklist.question: 做这个意味着不做什么？团队当前优先级是否允许？
checklist.how: 你的判断，AI 无法替代

review_guide.approve_signal: 问题真实 + 证据充分 + 范围可控 + 优先级匹配
review_guide.reject_signal: 伪需求 / 证据不足 / 范围过大 / 有更高优先级

agents.prompt_template:
Review the feature request from business, engineering, and design perspectives. Feature: {{feature_description}}

Output to: {{output_path}}/strategic-review.json

gate.notification: Strategic review complete. Review the scope decision, risk matrix, and Go/No-Go recommendation before proceeding.

review_guide.why: GO/NO-GO 是资源投入决策，AI 已量化风险和 ROI，但「投不投」是你的商业判断

star.situation: AI 已完成风险矩阵、ROI 估算、技术可行性评分，输出了战略评审报告
star.task: 判断：风险是否可接受？ROI 是否值得？技术路线是否正确？
star.result: GO = 进入需求阶段 | NO-GO = 终止 | PIVOT = 调整方向后重跑 S0

checklist.question: AI 标出的 TOP3 风险，你能承受最坏情况吗？
checklist.how: 检查 risk_matrix，关注 impact=high 的项

checklist.question: AI 估算的 ROI 假设是否过于乐观？
checklist.how: 检查 roi_estimate 的输入假设（用户量/转化率/客单价）

checklist.question: 技术选型是否与团队能力匹配？有无过度设计？
时间窗口是否紧迫？晚 1 个月会怎样？
checklist.how: 你的市场判断，AI 无法替代

review_guide.approve_signal: 风险可控 + ROI 假设合理 + 技术匹配 + 窗口合适
review_guide.reject_signal: 致命风险无缓解方案 / ROI 假设虚高 / 技术超出团队能力

architecture.name: Architecture Design
architecture.description: Design system architecture based on PRD

agents.prompt_template:
Design architecture for the feature described in the PRD.

PRD: {{S1_output}}

Project context:
- Java Maven multi-module
- Dubbo RPC + RocketMQ + Redis
- Existing modules: {{module_list}}

Output to: {{output_path}}/architecture.json

ui-design.name: UI Design
ui-design.description: Design comprehensive UI based on PRD and Architecture

auto_criteria: 页面数 ≥ PRD 用户故事数
组件复用率 ≥ 70%（自定义组件 / 总组件）
decision_log.auto_decision: 全部满足 → PASS，否则重试并修复

backend.name: Backend Development
backend.description: Implement backend code based on architecture

agents.prompt_template:
Implement the backend code for this feature.

Architecture: {{S2_output}}
PRD: {{S1_output}}

Quality Lessons:
{{quality_lessons}}

Rules:
- Follow existing code patterns
- Immutable objects only
- Handle all errors explicitly
- Max 800 lines per file
- Every CRUD must include: list, create, update, delete, getById, export(CSV)
- Seed data: ≥5 rows per table, cover all status values
- Dashboard: real aggregation queries, no hardcoded demo data
- AOP aspects must handle nullable fields

Output to: {{output_path}}/implementation.json

frontend.name: Frontend Development
frontend.description: Implement frontend UI based on architecture and UI design

agents.prompt_template:
Implement the frontend UI for this feature.

Architecture: {{S2_output}}
PRD: {{S1_output}}
UI Design: {{S2b_output}}

Backend APIs (SOURCE OF TRUTH — copy endpoint URLs, field names, param names exactly):
{{S3_output}}

Quality Lessons:
{{quality_lessons}}

=== IRON RULE: BACKEND CODE IS THE ONLY SOURCE OF TRUTH ===
Before writing ANY frontend code, you MUST:
1. Extract a complete API contract table from S3_output backend code:
   | Method | Path | Params (name + type + source: @RequestParam/@RequestBody/@PathVariable) | Response DTO fields |
2. Every frontend api/*.js function MUST reference this table — copy paths and field names character-for-character
3. If a param is @RequestParam, use query string. If @RequestBody, use JSON body. If @PathVariable, use path interpolation. NO GUESSING.
4. If backend has no endpoint for a UI action, do NOT render the button/page — leave a TODO comment instead
5. Response field bindings in Vue templates MUST match backend DTO/VO field names exactly (case-sensitive)
6. Include the extracted API contract table in your output as 'api_contract' field for downstream verification

Violating this rule produces 404/400 errors on every mismatched endpoint — this is the #1 cause of pipeline failure.
=== END IRON RULE ===

Rules:
- Use Vant components where possible
- Responsive design
- Proper error handling and loading states
- Max 800 lines per file
- ZERO empty function bodies — every button must have real implementation

Output to: {{output_path}}/implementation.json

testing.name: Unit Testing
testing.description: Write and run unit tests for the implementation

integration-testing.name: Integration Testing
integration-testing.description: Write and run integration tests for API endpoints and services

e2e-testing.name: E2E Testing
e2e-testing.description: Write and run end-to-end tests for critical user flows

smoke-test.name: Integration Smoke Test
smoke-test.description: Start the application, login, and verify every API endpoint returns 200 with data

agents.prompt_template:
Run the smoke test script to verify the application starts and all API endpoints work.

1. Execute: bash scripts/smoke-test.sh {{project_dir}}
2. If any endpoint fails, analyze the error and fix it
3. Re-run until all endpoints pass
4. Report results

Output to: {{output_path}}/smoke-test.json

browser-qa.name: Browser QA (Exploratory)
browser-qa.description: AI-driven exploratory browser testing using gstack browse — navigates like a real user to discover issues that scripted tests miss
browser-qa.skip_condition: gstack browse binary not found at ~/.claude/skills/gstack/browse/dist/browse

review.name: Code Review
review.description: Automated code review and security scan

agents.prompt_template:
Review all code changes for this feature.

Changed files:
{{S3_output.files_changed}}
{{S3b_output.files_changed}}

Quality Lessons:
{{quality_lessons}}

Check for:
- Code quality (naming, structure, complexity)
- Security vulnerabilities (OWASP Top 10)
- Performance issues
- Immutability violations
- COMPLETENESS: zero empty function bodies, all buttons have real handlers
- CONTRACT (IRON RULE — #1 failure cause): For EVERY frontend api/*.js call, verify against backend Controller:
  a) HTTP method matches (@GetMapping vs @PostMapping)
  b) URL path matches exactly (character-for-character)
  c) Param binding matches (@RequestParam→query string, @RequestBody→JSON, @PathVariable→path)
  d) Response field names in Vue templates match backend DTO/VO/Entity fields (case-sensitive)
  e) If frontend calls an endpoint that doesn't exist in backend, mark as Critical A-Contract
  Produce a contract_verification table in output
- SEED DATA: every table has ≥5 rows, covers all status values
- EXPORT: every list page has backend CSV export + frontend download button

Classify issues as: A-Contract, B-Stub, C-Data, D-Integration

Output to: {{output_path}}/review.json

Security audit of all code changes.

Changed files: {{S3_output.files_changed}}

Check: hardcoded secrets, SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, auth bypass, rate limiting

Output to: {{output_path}}/security-review.json

passes.focus: edge cases, race conditions, failure modes

auto_criteria: 部署清单覆盖率 = 100%（每个服务/中间件都有部署步骤）
回滚方案存在且 data_migration_reversible = true
S5 Critical/High issues 全部 status=fixed
环境变量清单中 sensitive=true 的项均有配置说明
监控告警 ≥ 3 条（至少覆盖 health/latency/error_rate）
decision_log.auto_decision: 全部满足 → PASS 并记录决策依据，任一不满足 → 重试修复

monitoring.name: Monitoring & Observability
monitoring.description: Set up monitoring, alerts, dashboards, and SLOs

agents.prompt_template:
Design monitoring and observability for this feature.

Architecture: {{S2_output}}
Deployment: {{S6_output}}

Generate:
- Alert definitions (critical/warning/info)
- Dashboard panels with key metrics
- Structured logging requirements
- SLO definitions

Output to: {{output_path}}/monitoring.json

documentation.name: Documentation
documentation.description: Generate API docs, user guide, changelog, and runbook

performance.name: Performance Testing
performance.description: Run performance benchmarks and load tests

release.name: Release & Rollout
release.description: Final release checklist, rollback plan, and deployment strategy

auto_criteria: ai-review 评分卡综合分 ≥ 70（加权平均）
S5 Critical issues 全部 fixed（High 允许 ≤ 2 条标注为 known_limitation）
S9 性能基准无 Critical 回归（P99 延迟 ≤ 基线 × 1.5）
回滚方案存在且触发条件明确
Release Notes 包含已知限制声明
decision_log.auto_decision: 全部满足 → PASS 并生成发布简报，任一不满足 → 记录阻塞原因并 HOLD
decision_log.human_escalation: 仅当 auto_criteria 有 2+ 条不满足时升级人工决策
